About

Aspiring Electronics Engineer passionate about Embedded Systems & IoT

ECE Engineer & Embedded Systems Developer

Aspiring Electronics Engineer pursuing B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering with a CGPA of 8.23. Eager to utilize my skills in embedded programming, circuit design, and microcontroller applications to contribute effectively to organizational growth and technological innovation.

I have hands-on experience in IoT projects, having built a Smart Irrigation System using ESP32, an Automatic Car Wiper using Rain Sensor, and a Poultry Farm Waste Management System. I also presented a research paper at a National Conference at NPR College of Engineering.
